text: Furnish my chill room for 2000 euros

I have finished furnishing the room. Here is my proposal: A comfortable 3-seater sofa is essential for a living room. A central coffee table provides a surface for drinks and decor. A functional TV bench for media and storage. An additional armchair offers extra seating and can be moved as needed.
  + Loft Sofa 3 (3-seat sofa, 499 EUR) -> Chill at (6.69, 1.525)
  + Beam TV Bench (TV bench, 149 EUR) -> Chill at (8.55, 4.24)
  + Ridge Armchair (armchair, 229 EUR) -> Chill at (4.475, 3.79)
  + Slab Coffee Table (coffee table, 79 EUR) -> Chill at (8.155, 1.525)
